S.FORM: == Abdelaziz Bouteflika == Mntucing hngkawas 1937 idas 3 jiyax 2 ka Abdelaziz Bouteflika ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Algeria ta sayang o kiya ka Abdelaziz Bouteflika, pnaah hngkawas 1999 idas 4 jiyax 27 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == abdəla*i* boutə*lika == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka abdəla*i* boutə*lika ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan algəɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka abdəla*i* boutə*lika, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: == Abdelaziz Bouteflika == Mntucing hngkawas 1937 idas 3 jiyax 2 ka Abdelaziz Bouteflika ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Algeria ta sayang o kiya ka Abdelaziz Bouteflika, pnaah hngkawas 1999 idas 4 jiyax 27 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == abdəla*i* boutə*lika == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka abdəla*i* boutə*lika ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan algəɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka abdəla*i* boutə*lika, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak pnjaħan pnatas
